codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly and minimally resolves pre-existing TypeScript regressions in the delivery-loop code paths. The changes are type-only fixes that ensure type safety while preserving all runtime behavior contracts. The worker added missing type definitions that were already defined in the shared package (DeliveryEffectKindV3) but not synchronized with the local types.ts. All 16 packages now pass typecheck, and the 382 core delivery-loop tests pass. The 2 pre-existing test failures in durable-delivery.test.ts are unrelated to these type fixes - they stem from legacy envelope removal in a prior commit.

summary: Feature m4-fix-delivery-loop-typecheck-baseline passes scrutiny. The type fixes are correct, minimal, and follow TypeScript best practices. The changes preserve runtime behavior while ensuring compile-time type safety across delivery-loop code paths.
